extraction.one_line_summary: PREIDLER Georg attacked inside final kilometer on slight uphill finish, held off YATES Simon and BUCHMANN Emanuel after BENNETT George's early move was absorbed.
tactical_patterns: BENNETT George attacked Bokovina summit 1.5km out but lacked finish punch when caught, revealing time-to-line misjudgment on short descents.
TEUNS Dylan appeared dropped on final climb then surged to close BENNETT's gap, exposing false weakness as tactical positioning.
PREIDLER Georg launched inside 600m on uphill finish kick while favorites marked each other, exploiting domestique invisibility after summit.
YATES Simon responded to PREIDLER but couldn't close final 400m, suggesting insufficient late-race acceleration despite climbing strength.

rider_signals.BENNETT George: negative: attacked too early at 1.5km on summit, swamped before finish when downhill negated his climbing advantage
rider_signals.TEUNS Dylan: positive: feigned weakness on final climb then closed gap rapidly, demonstrating tactical deception and climbing reserves
rider_signals.PREIDLER Georg: positive: timed attack perfectly inside 600m when favorites hesitated, showing superior finish timing awareness
rider_signals.YATES Simon: neutral: strong enough to respond but lacked final acceleration to close domestique's gap on uphill drag
rider_signals.BUCHMANN Emanuel: positive: marked YATES Simon effectively and finished strongly, demonstrating stage race form preservation
rider_signals.PINOT Thibaut: neutral: attacked on descent but faded before finish, suggesting descending aggression without finishing power
